displayTitle: Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates
synopsis: The Millennium Falcon has been damaged and captured by bloodthirsty Nikto pirates. You are trapped in the pirates' Predator-class vessel…with only one chance to break free. Time is already running out. Your mission: to steal the parts needed to fix the Falcon, repair your ship, and make a daring escape. May the Force be with you.
title: Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates
